{{Quote|I've got something they'll have trouble deflecting. Instant barbecue.|Nele|<ref name="Insider 85" />}}
'''Nele''' was one of the six [[Erv Lekauf]] [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] trained to be a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. He once helped stop a mini-[[Skirmish aboard ST 321|revolt]] by rebellious [[Sa Cuis]] clones along with his brethren and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] by suggesting they use [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrowers]].<ref name="Insider 85" />
